description: You are the IT Facilities Manager for a growing cloud services company. Your company has leased a commercial space to build a small data center. Transform the open building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a functional data center facility with four distinct zones: a Server Room, a Network Operations Center (NOC), an Electrical/UPS Room, and a Staging/Receiving area. The completed layout must feature at least 3 partition walls and 3 doors dividing the zones. The Server Room should contain at least 14 rack-like items (shelves, cabinets, or racks) arranged in rows, while the NOC requires at least 5 desks, 5 chairs, and 3 lamps. The Staging Area must include at least 2 tables, contributing to a facility-wide total of at least 17 shelf/cabinet items and 40 furniture items overall. Identify zones and aisles using at least 5 text labels (e.g., 'Server Room', 'NOC', 'Hot Aisle'). Save the completed layout by overwriting the existing file or saving to the same directory.
